extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: Main SoA, document pages 18-21. Synthesized markers n1..n10 for Notes-column references (not present as markers in the source). PK/ADA/Tumor-biopsy rows carry a source_note referencing the separate flow-chart tables (pp.22-24) instead of grid marks. Merged marks/text distributed with source_range; grey (N/A) cells omitted.

table_metadata.table_purpose: Main schedule across Screening, Treatment Phase (21-day cycles), End of Treatment, and Post-Treatment Follow-up (safety + survival).
table_metadata.notes: Section 1.3. Single logical table with header repeated on each of pages 18-21; modeled as one main_soa table. Notes column (source physical col 12) excluded from grid and captured as annotations.

schedule_properties.property_comment: Level-1 study phases: Screening, Treatment Phase, End of Treatment (EOT), Post Treatment Follow-up Phase. Classified 'epoch'. Label cell empty; name synthesized. Footnote 'a' (a cycle is 21 days) sits on the Treatment Phase value.

Level-2 sub-phases: Cycle 1 / Cycle 2 and Beyond (treatment cycles) and Safety follow-up Period / Survival follow-up. Row mixes cycle and follow-up divisions; classified 'period' per reviewer ruling (two values are treatment cycles).

Level-3 per-column timing: study-day ranges/days (D-28 to D-15, D-14 to D-1, D1, D8, D15) and relative post-dose timings (30/60/90 days after last IMP admin; every 90 days). Row mixes study_day and relative timepoints; classified 'study_day' per reviewer ruling; follow-up columns are relative-to-last-dose.
